skills.name: Taunt
skills.description: Once per turn, you can roll a single die. If the result is 3 or greater, the opponent takes 300 damage. Otherwise, you take 300 damage.

skills.name: Giant
skills.description: You can only perform Heavy attacks.

skills.name: Sling & Stone
skills.description: At the start of the game, you receive 5 [Stone Counters]. Before attacking, you may choose to discard 1 [Stone Counter]. If you do, increase the damage of your attack by 50%.

skills.name: Divine Protection
skills.description: If you did not activate [Divine Protection] last turn, you may skip your attack phase to recover 200 Health.

skills.name: Lord's Anointed
skills.description: Once per game, you can prevent any single damage taken.

skills.name: Jealousy
skills.description: Once per turn, you may lose 500 health and deal 500 damage to your opponent.

skills.name: Super Strength
skills.description: At the beginning of the game, you receive 3 [Hair Tokens]. For each [Hair Token] you have, your attacks deal +200 extra damage.

skills.name: Gullible
skills.description: Each time you answer a question wrong (when defending), you lose a [Hair Token].

skills.name: Assassination
skills.description: After a successful Attack, you can roll two dice. If the result is 7, skip your opponent's next turn. If the result is 6 or 8, deal +200 extra damage to the opponent. If result is 5 or 9, deal +100 extra damage to the opponent.
